features: Cold wax strips 40's gentle and effective formula
description: Product Description Product Description these wax strips are hair removal strips for the legs and body. Featuring moisturising Aloe vera and Vitamin E. Ingredients wax box contains wax strips. Directions Heat strips, apply to skin, wait, remove to remove hair. Avoid sensitive areas. Allow skin to cool before reapplying. Safety Warning Warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Do not use on face or head. Keep away from heat and open flames. May cause skin irritation. Always perform a patch test before use. If irritation occurs, discontinue use and seek medical advice. Keep out of reach of children and pets. See more
